patterns_recognized: Pre-cap score=5 (all four grading dimensions: F-signal + SP xERA + PQI + Stage agree) in the (0.50,0.55] pick_prob bucket should be CONFIRMED — ARI@CIN 6/12 (pre-cap A, won 5-2) was blocked by HARD CAP 10 and proved correct. MIA@PIT today replicates this exactly and earns CONFIRM to unlock GOLD.

F1* (starred small-sample SP) without F3 > 1000 corroboration lost badly on LAD@CHW 6/12 (8-2 blowout). F1* paired with F2 but no F3 on NYY@TOR today, combined with 3 WEAK_VS NYY batters vs Gausman and confidence_downgrade=True, warrants DOWNGRADE despite pre-cap=5.

Carry-thesis OVERRIDE (f5_full_delta >= 0.15 AND hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap < 0.020) requires grade_reasons 'Stage 1/2 disagree' per 6/11 lesson AND full_prob < 0.62 suppression gate per 6/10 lesson. ATL@NYM satisfies both: Δ=0.3419, near-zero gap, explicit stage disagree in grade_reasons, ATL full_prob=0.5071.

D-grade with SP xERA AGAINST and PQI AGAINST reliably predicts opposing direction (6/5 3-for-3, 6/7, 6/8 confirmed). TB@LAA has pre-cap D (-1) with SP AGAINST and PQI AGAINST on a HARD CAP 6 hallucinated edge — structural case for LAA override is clear.

confidence_downgrade=True permanently blocks HARD CAP 10 rescue even when pre-cap score=5 — 6/5 BAL@TOR blowout loss confirmed this rule; applies today to NYY@TOR (confidence_downgrade=True + acute_roster).

STL @ MIN.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with SP xERA 1.51 AGAINST pick (Prielipp over Liberatore) and PQI AGAINST (Δ=+20.1) — both primary signals oppose STL. confidence_downgrade=True adds structural uncertainty. All BvP data NO_DATA for both sides. Edge=+2.43pp is below the 4pp staking floor. No qualitative context overrides the D-grade. SKIP is correct process.

NYY @ TOR.reasoning: Pre-cap=5 would normally earn CONFIRM (ARI@CIN 6/12 precedent), but three blocking factors override: (1) confidence_downgrade=True permanently suspends rescue per 6/5 rule; (2) F1*=1.29 as the lead F-signal has no F3 corroboration — 6/12 LAD@CHW lesson requires one-tier DOWNGRADE; (3) NYY top-3 BvP vs Gausman shows 3 WEAK_VS (Rice shrunk 0.624, Bellinger shrunk 0.507, Chisholm shrunk 0.545), structurally hampering NYY offense. Keep SKIP.

No hard caps fired. confidence_downgrade=False, hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0129 (BAL pen slightly better). All BvP data NO_DATA. Pipeline set tier=SKIP despite B+ grade — no SP xERA dimension present. Edge=6.77pp is in band but tier holds SKIP. Directional confidence in BAL is solid.

Edge=3.91pp is below 4pp staking floor so no stake regardless. No BvP data for SEA vs Cavalli. confidence_downgrade=False. WSH direction is sound; no qualitative override.

HARD CAP 10 zeroed via no claude_decision; CONFIRM unlocks GOLD per the 6/12 ARI@CIN precedent. confidence_downgrade=False, hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0066 (MIA pen marginally better). No BvP concerns. Edge=8.2pp in band. This is the highest-confidence CONFIRM on the slate.

ARI @ CIN.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fired at -2.93pp — market prices ARI beyond model estimate; staking is negative EV and non-negotiable. confidence_downgrade=True additionally blocks rescue. Pre-cap A- (score=4) had F1*=1.52 + F3=4313.6 (F3 corroborates F1*) + SP xERA agrees + PQI + Stage agree — directional case is sound, but the market has already priced in ARI. CONFIRM CAP-1 block.

These opposing signals historically favor DET, but the SP gap (1.27) is below the >2.0 threshold that reliably predicts OVERRIDE. No OVERRIDE — Ramírez factor and thin SP gap do not meet the 2.0 override threshold.

NYM BvP (Bichette 0.794, Soto 0.829 vs Pérez) supports NYM offense. ATL carry thesis requires bullpen depth that the near-zero gap doesn't support.
